sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39590" key="e)pikataio/nhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικατ-αιόνησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n39590.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">additional fomentation</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:172" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.172</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
